div.data-tip: Positional Embeddings Learned or sinusoidal Shape: seq_len × d_model
Token Embedding Lookup table: vocab_size → d_model Output: seq_len × d_model
Masked Multi-Head Self-Attention Causal mask prevents attending to future tokens h heads, d_k = d_model / h
Feed-Forward Network Two linear layers with GELU d_model → 4·d_model → d_model
Final Layer Norm Applied after last transformer block
Linear projection d_model → vocab_size Often tied with token embedding weights
Softmax over vocabulary Output: probability distribution over vocab_size tokens

div.div:
Next-token probabilities
sequence length × vocabulary size
